warnings.All documents must be accurate and origi: All documents must be accurate and original. These documents are necessary for verification purposes. herosection.hero_title: Private Transfers in Jeddah, Taif, Madinah & Riyadh
herosection.hero_description: Book your private chauffeur in seconds. Fixed pricing, professional drivers, available 24/7.

feature_section.reliable_service_desc: Your driver arrives exactly when you expect. No delays. No stress.
feature_section.transparent_pricing_desc: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just fair, upfront costs.
feature_section.available_24_7_desc: Day or night, we're always ready to take you where you need to go.
feature_section.enter_pickup_desc: Tell us where you want to go
feature_section.choose_ride_desc: Select the car that best fits your comfort and budget needs
feature_section.confirm_enjoy_desc: Get instant confirmation and track your trip with ease
feature_section.journey_steps: Your Journey in Three Simple Steps

faq.how_to_book_question: How do I book a ride?
faq.how_to_book_answer: Simply enter your pickup and drop-off locations, select your preferred vehicle type, choose your date and time, then confirm your booking. You'll receive instant confirmation with driver details.
faq.drivers_verified_answer: Yes, all our drivers undergo thorough background checks, vehicle inspections, and regular training. We ensure the highest safety standards for our passengers.
faq.pricing_answer: Our pricing is transparent with no hidden fees. The fare is calculated based on distance, time, and vehicle type. You'll see the exact price before confirming your booking.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.payment_cash_desc: Pay with cash to the driver
checkout.payment_info: Your payment information is secure and protected
